# Alloro
> Business intelligence platform for licensed specialists

## About
Alloro provides competitive intelligence, market positioning, and growth tools for business owners in healthcare and professional services. Our platform analyzes local market data, tracks competitor activity, and delivers actionable insights.

## Key Pages
- /checkup -- Free business health checkup with competitive analysis
- /demo -- Interactive demo of the platform
- /[specialty]-[city] -- Local market intelligence for specialists in specific cities

## Contact
- Website: https://getalloro.com
- Support: support@getalloro.com
